items.question: How do I join the affiliate program?
items.answer: Simply click the 'Join Now' button above and complete the registration form. It takes less than 5 minutes and is completely free. Once approved, you'll get immediate access to your affiliate dashboard and marketing materials.

items.question: How much commission can I earn?
items.answer: You earn 30% recurring commission for every active user you refer. As you refer more users, you can move up to 35% (Pro tier) or 40% (Elite tier). There's no cap on earnings - the more you refer, the more you earn.

items.question: How often do I get paid?
items.answer: We pay commissions monthly via PayPal, bank transfer (ACH/SEPA), or cryptocurrency (Bitcoin/Ethereum). Payments are processed on the 15th of each month for the previous month's earnings. Minimum payout is $50.

items.question: What's the cookie duration?
items.answer: Our cookie lasts for 90 days. That means if someone clicks your link and signs up within 90 days, you get credit for that referral - even if they don't sign up immediately.

items.question: Can I promote Cashog on YouTube or social media?
items.answer: Absolutely! We encourage promotion on all platforms including YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, and LinkedIn. Just make sure to follow our brand guidelines and disclose your affiliate relationship.

items.question: Do you provide marketing materials?
items.answer: Yes! You'll get access to banners, text links, email templates, social media posts, landing pages, and video scripts. All materials are professionally designed and tested for high conversion rates.

items.question: Is there a limit to how much I can earn?
items.answer: No, there is absolutely no cap on earnings. Our top affiliates earn over $10,000 per month. The more you promote, the more you earn.

items.question: Can I refer users from any country?
items.answer: Yes! Cashog is available in over 50 countries including the US, UK, Canada, Australia, and most European countries. You can promote to audiences anywhere in the world.

items.question: What tracking software do you use?
items.answer: We use industry-leading affiliate tracking software that provides real-time analytics, click tracking, conversion tracking, and detailed reports. You can see exactly how many clicks, signups, and commissions you're earning.

items.question: Do you have an affiliate support team?
items.answer: Yes! You'll get access to dedicated affiliate support via email and live chat. Pro and Elite affiliates also get a personal account manager and monthly strategy calls.
